---
title: "code_1"
author: "Donovan Dean"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
editor: visual
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: true
  output: true
  message: false
  warning: false
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
```

# Ranking

```{r setup}
#Read in created spreadsheet of both ESPN and Bleacher Report top 30 player rankings
raw <- read_excel("shiny app/nba_consensus_rankings.xlsx")

#Create ESPN dataset by selecting player names and ranks from the raw data
espn <- raw |> 
  select(rank = Rank, player = 'ESPN Player') |> 
  mutate(source = "ESPN")
head(espn)

#Create Bleacher Report dataset by selecting player names and ranks from the raw data
br <- raw |> 
  select(rank = Rank, player = 'B/R Player') |> 
  mutate(source = "B/R")
head(br)

#Combine ESPN and B/R datasets into a single consensus table by matching player names, and compute consensus ranking metrics
consensus <- full_join(espn |> 
                         rename(espn_rank = rank),
                       br |> 
                         rename(br_rank = rank),
                       by = "player") |> 
  mutate(avg_rank = ifelse(is.na(espn_rank) & is.na(br_rank), NA,
                           rowMeans(cbind(espn_rank, br_rank), na.rm = TRUE)),
         in_both_lists = !is.na(espn_rank) & !is.na(br_rank),
         rank_difference = espn_rank - br_rank) |> 
  arrange(avg_rank, player)

#Diagnostic check
nrow(consensus)
sum(consensus$in_both_lists)
consensus |> filter(!in_both_lists)
consensus |> arrange(desc(abs(rank_difference)))

#Select the final top 30 players and keep only the main ranking variables
top30 <- consensus |> 
  slice_head(n = 30) |> 
  select(player, avg_rank, espn_rank, br_rank, in_both_lists, rank_difference)
print(top30)
```

# Stats

```{r setup}
#Read in data manually collecting from basketball data sources
df <- read_excel("shiny app/data.xlsx")

#Create era groups from the decade column
df$era <- case_when(
  df$player == "LeBron James" ~ "Post-Jordan Era (2000-2009), Modern Era (2010-Present)",
  df$decade %in% c("1950s", "1960s", "1970s") ~ "Classic Era (1950-1979)",
  df$decade %in% c("1980s", "1990s") ~ "Golden Age Era (1980-1999)",
  df$decade %in% c("2000s") ~ "Post-Jordan Era (2000-2009)",
  df$decade %in% c("2010s", "2020s") ~ "Modern Era (2010-Present)")

#Create weighted total championships (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_championships <- df$championships + 0.6 * df$`aba champ`
df[, c("player", "championships", "aba champ", "total_championships")]

#Create weighted total conference championships (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_conf_champ <- df$conf_champ + 0.6 * df$`aba c_champ`
df[, c("player", "conf_champ", "aba c_champ", "total_conf_champ")]

#Create weighted total Finals MVPs (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_finals_mvps <- df$finals_mvps + 0.6 * df$`aba play_mvp`
df[, c("player", "finals_mvps", "aba play_mvp", "total_finals_mvps")]

#Create weighted total MVPs (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_mvps <- df$mvps + 0.6 * df$`aba mvps`
df[, c("player", "mvps", "aba mvps", "total_mvps")]

#Create weighted total All-NBA selections (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_all_nba <- df$all_nba + 0.6 * df$all_aba
df[, c("player", "all_nba", "all_aba", "total_all_nba")]

#Create weighted total All-Defense selections (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_all_def <- df$all_def + 0.6 * df$`aba all_def`
df[, c("player", "all_def", "aba all_def", "total_all_def")]

#Create weighted total All-Star selections (NBA + adjusted ABA)
df$total_all_star <- df$all_star + 0.6 * df$`aba allstar`
df[, c("player", "all_star", "aba allstar", "total_all_star")]
```

```{r standardizing-accolades}
#Standardize team accolade variables
df$z_championships <- scale(df$total_championships)
df$z_conf_champ <- scale(df$total_conf_champ)
df[, c("player", "z_championships", "z_conf_champ")]

#Create Team Accolades Score (weighted)
df$team_score <- 0.90 * df$z_championships + 
                 0.10 * df$z_conf_champ
df[, c("player", "team_score")]

#Standardize weighted total MVPs so they can be compared fairly to the other accolade variables
df$z_mvps <- scale(df$total_mvps)

#Standardize weighted total Finals MVPs so they are on the same scale as the other accolade variables
df$z_finals_mvps <- scale(df$total_finals_mvps)

#Standardize Defensive Player of the Year awards so they can be combined fairly with the other accolade variables
df$z_dpoy <- scale(df$dpoy)

#Standardize weighted total All-NBA selections so they can be combined fairly with the other accolade variables
df$z_all_nba <- scale(df$total_all_nba)

#Standardize weighted total All-Defense selections so they can be combined fairly with the other accolade variables
df$z_all_def <- scale(df$total_all_def)

#Standardize weighted total All-Star selections so they can be combined fairly with the other accolade variables
df$z_all_star <- scale(df$total_all_star)
df[, c("player", "z_mvps", "z_finals_mvps", "z_dpoy", "z_all_nba", "z_all_def", "z_all_star")]

#Create the Individual Accolades Score by combining the standardized accolade variables using the chosen tier weights
df$individual_score <- 0.30 * df$z_mvps +
                       0.30 * df$z_finals_mvps +
                       0.15 * df$z_dpoy +
                       0.10 * df$z_all_nba +
                       0.10 * df$z_all_def +
                       0.05 * df$z_all_star
df[, c("player", "individual_score")]
```

```{r standardizing-stats}
#Standardize career points so they can be compared fairly with the other raw statistical variables
df$z_points <- scale(df$career_points)

#Standardize career rebounds so they can be compared fairly with the other raw statistical variables
df$z_rebounds <- scale(df$career_rebounds)

#Standardize career assists so they can be compared fairly with the other raw statistical variables
df$z_assists <- scale(df$career_assists)

#Standardize career steals so they can be compared fairly with the other raw statistical variables
df$z_steals <- scale(df$career_steals)

#Standardize career blocks so they can be compared fairly with the other raw statistical variables
df$z_blocks <- scale(df$career_blocks)
df[, c("player", "z_points", "z_rebounds", "z_assists", "z_steals", "z_blocks")]

#Create the Statistics Score by combining the standardized raw statistical variables using the chosen weights
df$stats_score <- 0.40 * df$z_points +
                  0.20 * df$z_rebounds +
                  0.20 * df$z_assists +
                  0.10 * df$z_steals +
                  0.10 * df$z_blocks
df[, c("player", "stats_score")]
```

```{r standardizing-advstats}
#Standardize PER so it can be fairly compared with Win Shares
df$z_per <- scale(df$per)

#Standardize Win Shares so it can be fairly compared with PER
df$z_win_shares <- scale(df$win_shares)
df[, c("player", "z_per", "z_win_shares")]

#Create the Advanced Stats Score by equally weighting PER and Win Shares
df$advanced_score <- 0.50 * df$z_per +
                     0.50 * df$z_win_shares
df[, c("player", "advanced_score")]
```

```{r standardizing-longevity}
#Standardize seasons played so it can be compared fairly with the other category scores
df$z_seasons <- scale(df$seasons)

#Longevity score is just the standardized seasons played
df$longevity_score <- df$z_seasons
df[, c("player", "seasons", "longevity_score")]
```

```{r stress-test}

#Create final GOAT score
df$goat_score <- 
  0.30 * df$team_score +
  0.35 * df$individual_score +
  0.15 * df$stats_score +
  0.15 * df$advanced_score +
  0.05 * df$longevity_score

#View results
df[, c("player", "goat_score")]

#Sort from highest to lowest
df[order(-df$goat_score), c("player", "goat_score")]

saveRDS(df, "final_goat_data.rds")
```
